title: Mandalorian flashpistol
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Mandalorian flashpistol''' was a crude [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] weapon used by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]]. It was a precursor to the [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]]. The Mandalorians used them along with [[Sword/Legends|swords]] and axes and would carry these on their [[Basilisk war droid/Legends|Basilisk war droids]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-11-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' {{1stm}}
*<!-- 1999-02-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''
